title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Supporting Actor Winner
text: At the 83rd annual Golden Globes held on January 11, 2026, Stellan Skarsgard won Best Performance by a Male Actor in a Supporting Role for his work in the film Sentimental Value. Skarsgard competed against fellow nominees including Benicio Del Toro, Jacob Elordi, Paul Mescal, Sean Penn, and Adam Sandler. The award recognizes outstanding supporting performances across all motion pictures presented during the awards season. The film Sentimental Value had a notably successful evening, with multiple cast and crew members earning recognition throughout the ceremony. The Norwegian drama directed by Joachim Trier tells the story of a filmmaker working on his relationship with his daughters while preparing a new production.
